title: Regulatory Frameworks - EU, US, UK, Korea

questions.question: When did the EU AI Act enter into force, and what category applied first?
options: August 2024; prohibited practices and AI literacy applied 2 February 2025
August 2026; only GPAI applied at force-date
August 2025; all categories applied at once
January 2024; high-risk systems applied that day
questions.question_zh: EU AI Act 何时生效？最先适用的是哪一类？
options_zh: 2024 年 8 月生效；禁止性实践与 AI literacy 条款于 2025 年 2 月 2 日开始适用
2026 年 8 月生效；生效当日只有 GPAI 适用
2025 年 8 月生效；所有类别同时适用
2024 年 1 月生效；当日 high-risk 系统就开始适用

questions.question: What is the maximum monetary penalty under the EU AI Act applicable from 2 August 2026?
options: Unlimited
Up to 1M EUR or 0.1% of global turnover
Up to 15M EUR or 3% of global turnover
Up to 5M EUR or 1% of global turnover
questions.question_zh: 从 2026 年 8 月 2 日起，EU AI Act 的最高罚款额度是多少？
options_zh: 无上限
最高 100 万欧元或全球营业额的 0.1%
最高 1500 万欧元或全球营业额的 3%
最高 500 万欧元或全球营业额的 1%

questions.question: Which three chapters make up the GPAI Code of Practice (10 July 2025)?
options: Training, Inference, Deployment
Capability, Control, Compliance
Privacy, Bias, Watermarking
Transparency, Copyright, Safety and Security
questions.question_zh: GPAI Code of Practice（2025 年 7 月 10 日）由哪三章组成？
options_zh: 训练、推理、部署
Capability、Control、Compliance
隐私、偏见、watermarking
Transparency、Copyright、Safety and Security

questions.question: What does the February 2025 UK AISI rebrand to 'AI Security Institute' signal?
options: A narrower scope focused on frontier-capability security, dropping algorithmic bias and free-speech framings
Merger with the EU AI Office
Closure of UK frontier evaluation
Expansion into algorithmic bias
questions.question_zh: 2025 年 2 月英国 AISI 更名为 “AI Security Institute” 释放了什么信号？
options_zh: 范围收窄，聚焦前沿能力安全，淡化算法偏见与言论自由相关议题
与 EU AI Office 合并
关闭英国的前沿评估
扩展到算法偏见领域

questions.question: What does the US CAISI rebrand (June 2025) signal in policy direction?
options: Merger with FDA
Stricter pre-deployment safety evaluation
A shift toward 'pro-growth AI policies,' with emphasis on standards and innovation support and reduced emphasis on pre-deployment evaluation
Mandatory open-source release of frontier models
questions.question_zh: 美国 CAISI 的更名（2025 年 6 月）在政策方向上释放了什么信号？
options_zh: 与 FDA 合并
更严格的部署前安全评估
转向 “pro-growth AI policies”，强调标准制定和创新支持，弱化部署前评估
强制要求所有前沿模型开源

questions.question: What is the headline obligation in Korea's AI Framework Act (effective January 2026)?
options: Identical adoption of the EU AI Act
Mandatory open-weights for all generative models
Total prohibition of foreign AI providers
Article 12 establishes an AISI under MSIT and mandates local representatives, risk assessment, and safety measures for high-impact and generative AI
questions.question_zh: 韩国 AI Framework Act（2026 年 1 月生效）的核心义务是什么？
options_zh: 完全照搬 EU AI Act
强制所有生成式模型开放权重
完全禁止外国 AI 提供商
第 12 条在 MSIT 下设立 AISI，并要求高影响及生成式 AI 设立本地代表、做风险评估并采取安全措施
